title: Planet Helios
description: Modpack for Planet Helios Server. Optional for Playing Planet Helios Network's Celestia Game Mode!
body:
Ever wanted to join **HeyImHelios**' Minecraft Server?

**WELL NOW YOU CAN!** 

We are now publicly on Modrinth to make a better experience for our players! Now head on over to Planet Helios or even play this pack alone and have a jolly good time!

Complete with **active developers** and **Monthly** events you will be overjoyed with the great amount of content you can consume in Planet Helios you will find new Biomes and Mobs every play session.

The modpack includes a Working proximity chat, beautiful lands, more bosses, an updated ender dragon fight, 60+ new biomes including the nether and end there is so much more to explore with Planet Helios...

Server IP: play.planethelios.net
